entityTypes.name: compensationInfo
entityTypes.description: Comprehensive compensation information for employee assignments including salary details, pay components, benefits, and related financial data with effective dating and historical tracking capabilities.

properties.name: id
properties.summary: Unique identifier for the employee assignment
properties.description: System-generated unique identifier for the employee assignment, used to track compensation records across time periods.

properties.name: startDate
properties.summary: Effective start date of the compensation record
properties.description: The date from which this compensation record is effective. Used for historical tracking and point-in-time queries.

complexTypes.name: compensationPayComponents
complexTypes.summary: Pay component details within a compensation record
complexTypes.description: Represents a single pay component entry within a compensation record, including the component type, amount, currency, and payment frequency.

properties.name: payComponentType
properties.description: Identifies the category of this pay component (e.g. base salary, bonus, allowance).

entitySets.name: compensationInfo
entitySets.summary: Retrieve compensation data for a specific employee assignment
entitySets.description: Fetch comprehensive compensation information for a particular employee including base salary, recurring pay components, target pay components, pay group details, and related compensation structure information.

functionImports.name: getCompensationHistory
functionImports.summary: Retrieve compensation history for an employee
functionImports.description: Returns a paginated list of historical compensation records for the specified employee, ordered by effective date descending.

parameters.name: employeeId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the employee whose compensation history is requested.
